Source dataset: datasets/currency-codes
Source URL: https://github.com/datasets/currency-codes

The source repository README states:

"Placing in the Public Domain under the Public Domain Dedication and License.
The original site states no restriction on use and the data is small and
completely factual."

This vendored file is a derived static JavaScript lookup generated from the
current ISO 4217 entries in that dataset, keyed by numeric code.
